initialTransition.CONTINUOUS_ACCEPTANCE: no completed path bar closes inside the frozen range
initialTransition.EARLY_REJECTION: first completed close inside within 15 elapsed minutes
initialTransition.DELAYED_REJECTION: first completed close inside after 15 elapsed minutes

overlappingTags.REJECTION_TO_POC: POC touched during the observed path
overlappingTags.REACCEPTANCE_AFTER_REENTRY: expected outside close observed after the first inside close
overlappingTags.OPPOSITE_BREAKOUT: opposite outside close observed during the path

contract.directionalFlowImbalance: signed cumulative delta in the shadow direction divided by total volume over the first N path bars
contract.first3BarsFlowRegime: causal shadow confirmation available after three completed path bars; positive versus non-positive, with no fitted threshold
contract.observationEnd: first completed chart bar reaching 60 elapsed minutes, with at most 5 minutes completion tolerance

split.selectionLeakageReason: Transition and early-flow hypotheses were formulated after inspecting this overlapping sample.

assessment.conclusion: Descriptive path classification only; all transition and flow hypotheses require unseen prospective sessions.

guardrail: No executable ATAS entry, order, stop, target, PnL, or intrabar execution assumption is produced.
